mapper.sql: id, refund_no, order_id, order_no, member_id, member_name, refund_amount, reason, evidence, status, handle_note, handler_id, handle_time, apply_time, finish_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM refund ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refund (refund_no, order_id, order_no, member_id, member_name, refund_amount, reason, evidence, status, handle_note, handler_id, handle_time, apply_time, finish_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{refundNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{refundAmount}, #{reason}, #{evidence}, #{status}, #{handleNote}, #{handlerId}, #{handleTime}, #{applyTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE refund SET refund_no=#{refundNo}, refund_amount=#{refundAmount}, reason=#{reason}, evidence=#{evidence}, status=#{status}, handle_note=#{handleNote}, handler_id=#{handlerId}, handle_time=#{handleTime}, finish_time=#{finishTime}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE refund SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE refund SET status=#{status}, handle_note=#{handleNote}, handler_id=#{handlerId}, handle_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refund WHERE status = #{status}
